mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.user_id FROM tag t INNER JOIN document_tag dt ON t.id = dt.tag_id WHERE dt.document_id = #{documentId}
SELECT id, title, content, category_id, user_id, create_time, update_time FROM document WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT id, title, content, category_id, user_id, create_time, update_time, is_deleted, deleted_at FROM document WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 1 ORDER BY deleted_at DESC
SELECT id, title FROM document WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
